propositions: Add an intent-based router near the top of docs/README.md routing four audiences (human client, LLM client, human contributor, LLM contributor) to the right docs.
Add a compact symptom-to-recovery troubleshooting table covering at least three common failure modes with concrete fixes and links.
Map 'claim/transition exits 10' to optimistic-concurrency guidance to pick another ticket.
Map missing 'rebar-mcp' to installing the '[mcp]' extra, and 'unknown key ignored' to using the repo venv instead of a stale global build.
Ensure every router and table link resolves, verified locally with the link checker.
Keep the router and troubleshooting table concise as a routing aid rather than a second manual.
